calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Andrew Zacks, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Davis-Paul Management Group, represented by agent: Elizabeth Aldmelt.
Jennifer Fearnow, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Raymond Turner.
The Judge Pro Tem James Stanton Bair, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Entry of Judgment", which was NOT filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.

Ntc And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents;For Deemed Admissions And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions; Declaration Memo Of P And A
Off Calendar Jan-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: AAPPEARANCES:
Scott A. Freedman, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: David-Paul Management Group
Raymond Turner, Defedant

RULING: After hearing, PLAINTIFF DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP, A CALIFORNIA Ntc And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents;For Deemed Admissions And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions is MOOT. Responses have been served. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
